description: Firewall update requires firewall_id and PUTs label/status. Note: Go gates on confirm while Python does not (see report), so only the confirmed success path is captured.

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This updates a Cloud Firewall. Set confirm=true to proceed.

cases.name: rejects an invalid inbound_policy (proto FirewallPolicy enum)
cases.expect_error: inbound_policy must be one of: ACCEPT, DROP
